titleStmt.title: SII 38.402: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 402. (A.R. No. 402 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the second Gōpura, left of entrance, Bṛihadāmba temple, left of entrance.

p.hi: King: Narasiṅgarāya-uḍaiyār Year: Śaka 140[3] A.D. Viḷambi, Mithuna, śu. 7 Monday, Uttiraṭṭādi, Subhayōga, Gajanāya karaṇa = This data may correspond to 22nd June 1478 A.D., if the Śaka date was 1400 and ba. di. 7.

summary.p: Incomplete. Begins with the epithet of the king, Śrīmaṉmahāmaṇḍalēśura.
Refers to the territorial division Rājagembhīraṉ-malai in Murugamaṅgalapaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī maṉ makāmaṇṭalecura Ariyavipāṭaṉ paācaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭukuṭātāṉ tulukkataḷa(vi)vipāṭaṉ tulukkamo
kām tavittāṉ Irācātiirācaṉ raācaparamecuraṉ metiṉi micurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuvanaraciṅkayirāya Uṭaiyar piṟutiviyirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa
cakāttam 1000 4 100 3 melcellā niṉṟa viḷampivaruṣattu mituṉa nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakkaṣattu saptamiyum comavāramu Uttiraṭṭātiyum cupayokamum kavacakaraṇamum peṟṟa
Iṟṟai nāḷ ce(o)yaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟa koṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu Irācakempiraṉmalaikku Aṭaitta paṟṟu
Digital edition of SII 38.402 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
